description: The project selector and all projects links don’t render well on mobile. Put them on a new row

log.outcome: The specification is accurate, complete, and actionable. All referenced files exist and have the expected structure. The mission clearly identifies a real problem (ProjectSelector has zero CSS styles, needs mobile layout fix), the steps have concrete deliverables, and the testing approach matches existing project patterns. The spec correctly identifies that ProjectSelector.tsx uses BEM class names but lacks any corresponding CSS.
